newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The ~$1B (1.557tn won) silicon-capacitor supply deal with a U.S. AI-chip developer was disclosed May 20, and the iM Securities target hike to KRW 2.3M (the June driver) was already captured in the June 9 verdict. Stock is roughly flat (+1.0%) since the refresh after a >1,000% / +637% YTD run.

sources.label: SEM still undervalued after 1,000% rally; iM lifts target to 2.3M won (Seoul Economic Daily)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha-vs-passives lens: a +637% YTD, well-covered name whose recent moves were target-hike/flow driven, not new evidence. No fresh fundamental catalyst since June 9; the prior 'down' (post-rerating chase) posture stands. Crowding keeps residual alpha thin - small -1, hold near bottom.
verdicts.bull: Genuine AI-server MLCC + silicon-capacitor bottleneck supplier with a $1B multi-year contract; world #2 MLCC.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but >1,000% rally and broad sell-side coverage leave little residual alpha vs passives.
verdicts.bear: Extreme crowding/rerating; recent pops are target hikes, not new orders - asymmetry is poor on this page.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New AI-server MLCC / silicon-capacitor design wins
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowding and mean-reversion after a 10x run
